description_long: This is a women's wedge sandal featuring a high, layered platform sole in a beige color and a slip-on design. The upper consists of two wide, overlapping brown leather or faux leather straps that cross over the top of the foot, providing both style and support. The insole is cushioned and matches the beige tone of the sole, offering comfort for extended wear. The wedge heel is solid and features horizontal grooves for added visual interest and stability. The open-toe and open-back design make it suitable for warm weather and casual urban outings. The overall construction appears sturdy, with clean stitching and a smooth finish.
description: A women's wedge sandal with brown leather straps and a beige, grooved platform sole, featuring an open-toe slip-on design. The shoe is stylish, comfortable, and well-constructed for urban wear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full wedge heel, layered sole, and overlapping brown straps.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the open toe and the arrangement of the two wide brown straps.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wedge heel and the smooth transition between the upper and sole.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the rounded heel and the open-back design.
